understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to push all selectable pieces onto '+' goal tiles simultaneously, but I failed to understand how to switch between pieces; most CLICK actions had no effect. I also wasted steps clicking invalid positions instead of moving pieces toward goals.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. Some objects are pushable (blocks). Walls block movement. CLICK is supposed to switch control to another selectable piece at a given pixel position, but it only worked when the position exactly matched a selectable piece's position and there was no obstruction preventing the switch. I incorrectly assumed the 3-pixel grid cell size matched the semantic_grid, but coordinates in objects and player.position use 3-pixel spacing. My attempts to click pieces failed because I used semantic_grid cell indices instead of actual pixel coordinates.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to push all selectable pieces onto '+' goal tiles simultaneously, but I failed to understand how to switch between pieces; most CLICK actions had no effect. I also wasted steps clicking invalid positions instead of moving pieces toward goals.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. Some objects are pushable (blocks). Walls block movement. CLICK is supposed to switch control to another selectable piece at a given pixel position, but it only worked when the position exactly matched a selectable piece's position and there was no obstruction preventing the switch. I incorrectly assumed the 3-pixel grid cell size matched the semantic_grid, but coordinates in objects and player.position use 3-pixel spacing. My attempts to click pieces failed because I used semantic_grid cell indices instead of actual pixel coordinates.
